message.content: Read the file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST01_LH\Module1.vb and find the Load_BASIC_Data() function. List ALL column names that are read from Table_BASIC (look for rs_MDB("column_name") or Rs.Fields("column_name") patterns). Also check if CheckAndAddTextColumn and CheckAndAddFlagColumn functions exist. Return the complete Load_BASIC_Data() function code.

   301→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   302→
   303→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   304→
   305→        hexv = ""
   306→        Do While DecNum > 0
   307→
   308→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   309→
   310→            Select Case na
   311→                Case 10
   312→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   313→                Case 11
   314→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   315→                Case 12
   316→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   317→                Case 13
   318→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   319→                Case 14
   320→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   321→                Case 15
   322→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   323→                Case Else
   324→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   325→            End Select
   326→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   327→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   328→            Else
   329→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   330→                Exit Do
   331→            End If
   332→        Loop
   333→
   334→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   335→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   336→        Else
   337→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   338→        End If
   339→    End Function
   340→
   341→    ''' <summary>
   342→    ''' PLC 주소로 직접 접근하는 Helper 함수
   343→    ''' D4300~D4311 -> PLC_VALUE(0~11)
   344→    ''' D4350~D4361 -> PLC_VALUE(12~23)
   345→    ''' </summary>
   346→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   347→        If address >= 4300 And address <= 4311 Then
   348→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4300)
   349→        ElseIf address >= 4350 And address <= 4361 Then
   350→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4338)  ' 4350 - 12 = 4338
   351→        Else
   352→            ' 잘못된 주소
   353→            Return 0
   354→        End If
   355→    End Function
   356→
   357→    Public Class Crc16
   358→
   359→        Private Shared CrcTable As UShort() = {&H0, &HC0C1, &HC181, &H140, &HC301, &H3C0, _
   360→           &H280, &HC241, &HC601, &H6C0, &H780, &HC741, _

   368→           &H1680, &HD641, &HD201, &H12C0, &H1380, &HD341, _
   369→           &H1100, &HD1C1, &HD081, &H1040, &HF001, &H30C0, _
   370→           &H3180, &HF141, &H3300, &HF3C1, &HF281, &H3240, _
   371→           &H3600, &HF6C1, &HF781, &H3740, &HF501, &H35C0, _
   372→           &H3480, &HF441, &H3C00, &HFCC1, &HFD81, &H3D40, _

   377→           &H2D00, &HEDC1, &HEC81, &H2C40, &HE401, &H24C0, _
   378→           &H2580, &HE541, &H2700, &HE7C1, &HE681, &H2640, _
   379→           &H2200, &HE2C1, &HE381, &H2340, &HE101, &H21C0, _
   380→           &H2080, &HE041, &HA001, &H60C0, &H6180, &HA141, _
   381→           &H6300, &HA3C1, &HA281, &H6240, &H6600, &HA6C1, _
   382→           &HA781, &H6740, &HA501, &H65C0, &H6480, &HA441, _
   383→           &H6C00, &HACC1, &HAD81, &H6D40, &HAF01, &H6FC0, _
   384→           &H6E80, &HAE41, &HAA01, &H6AC0, &H6B80, &HAB41, _
   385→           &H6900, &HA9C1, &HA881, &H6840, &H7800, &HB8C1, _
   386→           &HB981, &H7940, &HBB01, &H7BC0, &H7A80, &HBA41, _
   387→           &HBE01, &H7EC0, &H7F80, &HBF41, &H7D00, &HBDC1, _
   388→           &HBC81, &H7C40, &HB401, &H74C0, &H7580, &HB541, _
   389→           &H7700, &HB7C1, &HB681, &H7640, &H7200, &HB2C1, _
   390→           &HB381, &H7340, &HB101, &H71C0, &H7080, &HB041, _
   391→           &H5000, &H90C1, &H9181, &H5140, &H9301, &H53C0, _
   392→           &H5280, &H9241, &H9601, &H56C0, &H5780, &H9741, _
   393→           &H5500, &H95C1, &H9481, &H5440, &H9C01, &H5CC0, _
   394→           &H5D80, &H9D41, &H5F00, &H9FC1, &H9E81, &H5E40, _
   395→           &H5A00, &H9AC1, &H9B81, &H5B40, &H9901, &H59C0, _
   396→           &H5880, &H9841, &H8801, &H48C0, &H4980, &H8941, _
   397→           &H4B00, &H8BC1, &H8A81, &H4A40, &H4E00, &H8EC1, _
   398→           &H8F81, &H4F40, &H8D01, &H4DC0, &H4C80, &H8C41, _
   399→           &H4400, &H84C1, &H8581, &H4540, &H8701, &H47C0, _
   400→           &H4680, &H8641, &H8201, &H42C0, &H4380, &H8341, _
   401→           &H4100, &H81C1, &H8081, &H4040}
   402→
   403→        Public Shared Function ComputeCrc(ByVal data As Byte()) As UInt16
   404→
   405→            Dim crc As UShort = &HFFFF
   406→
   407→            For Each datum As Byte In data
   408→                crc = CUShort((crc >> 8) Xor CrcTable((crc Xor datum) And &HFF))
   409→            Next
   410→
   411→            Return crc
   412→
   413→        End Function
   414→
   415→    End Class
   416→
   417→End Module
   418→

content.text:
Perfect! I have found the Load_BASIC_Data() function and analyzed the code. Here are my findings:

## Load_BASIC_Data() 함수 (라인 80-115)

```vb
Public Sub Load_BASIC_Data()

    ' FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL 컬럼 자동 생성 (TEXT)
    CheckAndAddTextColumn("FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL")

    Connection_Open_MDB()
    Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

    Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_BASIC", Mdb_Connect)

    If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

        BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value)
        BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value)
        BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT = Rs.Fields("TOOL1_UNIT").Value

        FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL = Rs.Fields("FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value
        FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ = Rs.Fields("FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ").Value
        FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL = Rs.Fields("FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL").Value

    End If

    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
    Rs.Close()
    Connection_Close_MDB()

    ' F/PROOF 중복체크 플래그 컬럼 자동 생성 및 로드
    CheckAndAddFlagColumn("FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP")
    CheckAndAddFlagColumn("FLAG_HANESS_DUP")
    LoadFProofFlags()

End Sub
```

## Table_BASIC에서 읽는 ALL 컬럼명

1. **TOOL1_MIN**
2. **TOOL1_MAX**
3. **TOOL1_UNIT**
4. **FUNCTION_BUCKLE_SERIAL**
5. **FUNCTION_BUCKLE_TQ**
6. **FUNCTION_HANESS_SERIAL**

추가로, LoadFProofFlags() 함수(라인 168-186)에서 같은 Table_BASIC에서 읽는 컬럼:
7. **FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP**
8. **FLAG_HANESS_DUP**

## CheckAndAddTextColumn과 CheckAndAddFlagColumn 함수 존재 여부

✅ **둘 다 존재합니다:**

- **CheckAndAddFlagColumn** (라인 138-150): MDB Table_BASIC에 YESNO 컬럼 자동 생성
- **CheckAndAddTextColumn** (라인 153-165): MDB Table_BASIC에 TEXT(255) 컬럼 자동 생성

절대경로: **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST01_LH\Module1.vb**
